commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `sessions_delegate` and `sessions_delegate_batch` agent tools, plus catalog/display wiring and subagent cleanup synchronization.

PR surface: Source +547, Tests +327, Other +20. Total +894 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the new delegate call omits inherited tool policy, batch starts child promises concurrently, and current thread-bound subagent delivery also uses `expectsCompletionMessage: false`. I did not run a live scenario in this read-only review.
